programmes.show_description: Jenny is back in the 90s with killer cuts and some proper full-on guitar action! Including Guns n Roses, Nirvana, Bon Jovi, Oasis, The Offspring and Lenny Kravitz.
Party pop rock anthems spanning 5 decades! From Queen, Kiss & Aerosmith to Blur, Paramore & The White Stripes.
From killer riffs in the 20s right back to the legendary solos of the 80s, we're counting down 12 essential anthems that you just need to know!
Over 4 hours of non-stop the biggest, timeless anthems! Featuring legendary acts like AC/DC, Jimi Hendrix, and Queen, through to Linkin Park, Razorlight and Fall Out Boy.
Turn it up to 11 for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!
From Peter Frampton and Free to Foreigner & Fleetwood Mac - the 70s was a feelgood and carefree time for pop and rock, and we bring back that vibe with 30 of the absolute best!
A decade of mega hits and the loudest anthems! Expect Biffy Clyro, Linkin Park, Blink 182, Evanescence, Fall Out Boy & loads more!
Starting in the 00s, bow before the royal rock stage! Home to the best front men and leading ladies that the world of rock has produced!
Turn it up to 11 for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!
Alex serves up 30 of the greatest, darkest, skinny jeans-iest, heavy eye makeup-iest & back-combed hair-iest anthems from the worlds most glorious miserable genre!
A decade of mega hits and the loudest anthems! Expect Biffy Clyro, Linkin Park, Blink 182, Evanescence, Fall Out Boy & loads more!
In reverse: Starting in 2015, we're going back 35 rock years of number 1 hit singles & albums!
These are the legendary rock stars that made the 80s! Expect Meat Loaf, Bonnie Tyler, Queen, Bon Jovi, AC/DC, Iron Maiden & loads more!
From our sister channel NOW 70s, the biggest rock n roll rebels. Presented by the man who was there "that groovy host from the west coast" Radio 1 legend Rosko!
Number 1 rock songs from the last 50 years! With mega hits from the Arctic Monkeys & KOL right back to legends like The Stones & T.Rex!
Starting back in 1974 here is an hour of Anthems from the greatest British rock band in the world!
Mark Goodier brings you our exclusive chart of the 100 biggest rock songs of the 80s, based on streaming data, historic sales info, and enduring global appeal. Crank this up LOUD!
Let your hair down as Claire Sturgess has a wild ride of fabulous follicles and awesome rock hairdos! From Bowie's glamorous transformations to Joe Elliot's indestructible mullet.
Number 1 rock songs from the last 50 years! With mega hits from the Arctic Monkeys & KOL right back to legends like The Stones & T.Rex!
Nicky Horne presents his favourite 30 Kick Ass Videos. which need to sit in the hall of fame for Rock Video Greatness. Featuring Bon Jovi, David Bowie, Kate Bush, Nirvana and Ozzy!
These monsters were created for your enjoyment! 30 of the biggest, spine tingling anthems from legends like Meatloaf and Kiss through to My Chemical Romance and YungBlud!
